home.help_msg: We are going to help you to check your device.

analysis.question: Do you want to analyze the captured communications?
analysis.some_time_msg: Yes, it can take some time...

capture.tip_smartphone_events:
If you are analyzing a smartphone, disable mobile data, avoid browsing the Internet
and perform actions such as…
capture.tip_send_sms: Send a message to a loved one.
capture.tip_check_mailbox: Open the latest email in your mail app.
capture.tip_move_phone: Walk a few meters with your phone.
capture.tip_duration_ideal: Your capture should last at least 15 minutes, ideally 30 minutes.
capture.tip_coffee_tea: Feel free to grab a coffee or tea.
capture.tip_smartphone_events_1: If you are analyzing a smartphone, disable cellular data…
capture.tip_smartphone_events_2: Turn off any VPN service used on the phone.
capture.tip_smartphone_events_3: Avoid browsing the Internet during the capture.
capture.tip_smartphone_events_4: However, we encourage you to perform actions such as…
capture.tip_begin:
We will guide you through a few actions to help
optimize the capture of your device’s communications.

generate-ap.tap_msg: Tap the white frame to generate a new network.
generate-ap.generate_ap_msg: We generate an ephemeral network for you.
generate-ap.error_msg1:
Unfortunately, we got some issues
during the AP creation.
generate-ap.error_msg2:
Please check that you have configured the right
network interfaces in the back-end.

report.stalkerware_msg:
Your device is compromised by
a Stalkerware, please check the report.
report.location_msg:
An application is sharing your
current geolocation with a third party.
report.high_msg:
You have {nb} high alert,
your device seems to be compromised.
report.moderate_msg:
You have {nb} moderate alerts,
your device might be compromised.
report.low_msg:
You have only {nb} low alerts,
don't hesitate to check them.
report.no_alerts_title: Analysis of your smartphone's communications did not cause any alerts.
report.no_alerts_subtext: You can see below the communications issued by it during the capture.
report.analysis_health_offline: No internet connection during analysis. About {lost}% of analysis capability was unavailable (effectiveness: {eff}%).
report.analysis_health_degraded: Some external checks failed. About {lost}% of analysis capability may be missing (effectiveness: {eff}%).
report.analysis_health_degraded_with_checks: Some external checks failed ({checks}). About {lost}% of analysis capability may be missing (effectiveness: {eff}%).

save-capture.please_connect: Please connect a USB key to save your capture.
save-capture.tap_msg: You can tap the USB key to start a new capture.
save-capture.capture_download: The capture download is going to start...
save-capture.remote_download_hint: On a workstation, use the Capture identifier and password to retrieve an archive with your capture from the SpyGuard.net website.
save-capture.remote_download_hint_prefix: On a workstation, use the Capture identifier and password to retrieve an archive with your capture from the

upload_errors.ip_blocked: Access denied: this connection is temporarily blocked by the remote server. Try again later or save to a USB drive.
upload_errors.rate_limited: Too many upload attempts from this network (limit: {daily_limit} per day). Try again later or use a USB drive.
upload_errors.file_too_large: The archive is too large (maximum {max_mb} MB).
upload_errors.missing_file: The server did not receive the file.
upload_errors.bad_zip: The archive was rejected by the server.
upload_errors.bad_zip_not_encrypted: The server requires every file in the archive to be encrypted.
upload_errors.bad_zip_structure: The archive does not contain exactly the expected files.
upload_errors.network: Could not reach the upload server. Check the connection or use a USB drive.
upload_errors.prepare_failed: Could not prepare the archive for upload.
upload_errors.export_not_server: Server export is not enabled in configuration.
upload_errors.no_response: No response from the upload server.
upload_errors.invalid_response: Invalid response from the upload server.
upload_errors.missing_capture_id: The server response did not include a capture id.
upload_errors.invalid_capture_id: The server returned an invalid capture id.
upload_errors.cleanup_failed: Upload succeeded but cleaning up the device failed.

save-capture.tap_card_msg: Tap the card to start a new capture.
save-capture.remote_download_hint_rich: On a workstation, use the Capture identifier and password to retrieve an archive with your capture from the {site} website.

modals.want_to_quit: Do you want to leave the application?
modals.please_give_the_password: Please enter the password for the network:
modals.want_to_whitelist:
Do you want to add {host} to the whitelist
for the next analysis?
